c.d: Supports multiple operating systems and devices to enable seamless note access anywhere
Ability to organize notes using tags, folders, notebooks, or hierarchical structures
Supports handwriting input, conversion to text, drawing, and stylus integration
Allows sharing notes or collaborating with others in real time or asynchronously
Ability to create and access notes without internet connectivity
Supports adding images, sketches, tables, audio, or other multimedia in notes
Maintains history of note edits and backs up previous versions for retrieval
Cost structure including free, freemium, or paid plans
User interface intuitiveness and design simplicity
